raw_response:
{
  "current_life_events": "My father's health has taken a turn for the worse, and he has become more immersed in his Christian faith, pressing me to fully embrace it. My mother, who has always balanced our Buddhist practices, feels helpless and distant, leaving me to navigate both religions on my own. The increased religious pressure and my father's declining condition have left me feeling isolated and emotionally overwhelmed.",
  "mental_state": "I am wrestling with a sense of loneliness and confusion, feeling caught between my father's expectations and my own beliefs. The pressure to conform to one faith while feeling disconnected from both has left me emotionally drained.",
  "mood": "conflicted and isolated",
  "emotions": ["lonely", "confused", "guilty", "anxious"],
  "resistance_cooperation_level": "medium",
  "currently_active_problems": ["loneliness", "conflicts_with_parents"],
  "why_bringing_these_up_now": "The worsening of my father's health and his intensified religious demands have made my feelings of loneliness and parental conflict more acute, prompting me to seek support today."
}
